'''Umnub''' was the smaller of the two [[Moon/Legends|moons]] that [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Sullust/Legends|Sullust]], on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. It was incapable of supporting life, but the moon was [[Mining/Legends|mined]] for [[Ore/Legends|ores]] and [[Mineral/Legends|minerals]] during the height of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] by the [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustans]].<ref name="Strongholds" /> The mines finally played out approximately a [[1000 BBY/Legends|thousand years]] before the outbreak of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]; as a result, the facilities were then abandoned.<ref name="GatORW">''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]''</ref>

{{Moon-stub}}
